# VaultaCloud

> VaultaCloud is an offline-first private cloud storage and file management platform built for businesses in Africa and emerging markets.

VaultaCloud gives organizations secure, private file storage that works online, offline, and inside their office network (LAN). It is a self-hosted or cloud-hosted solution with a one-time purchase pricing model — no recurring monthly fees.

## Core Positioning

"Your organization's private cloud. Online, offline, or inside your office network."

VaultaCloud was designed specifically for the infrastructure realities of African businesses:
- Intermittent internet connectivity
- Power outages (load shedding, NEPA disruptions)
- High cost of international bandwidth
- Dollar-denominated subscription fees
- Data sovereignty concerns with foreign cloud providers

## Key Differentiators

- **Offline-first architecture**: Files remain accessible during internet outages; auto-syncs when connection returns
- **LAN/office network deployment**: Full file access at local network speed with no internet required
- **Private cloud ownership**: Data stored on your own infrastructure, not on shared cloud servers
- **One-time purchase**: No monthly subscriptions; pay once and own the software
- **White-label deployment**: IT resellers can deploy under their own brand and custom domain
- **WhatsApp integration**: Share files directly via WhatsApp from inside the platform

## Target Markets

- Nigerian businesses (primary market, HQ in Abuja)
- African SMEs across Ghana, Kenya, South Africa, Uganda, Tanzania, Rwanda, Cameroon, Senegal
- Industry verticals: Law firms, Architecture & Engineering, Accounting firms, Healthcare, Real Estate, Photo/Video, Education, Government

## Pricing Model

One-time purchase. No monthly fees. No per-seat recurring costs.
- Starter: $299 (up to 10 users, 500 GB)
- Business: $699 (up to 50 users, 2 TB)
- Enterprise: Custom pricing (unlimited users, unlimited storage)

## Technical Stack

- TypeScript / React frontend
- Node.js backend
- Offline-first architecture with background sync
- REST API with webhook support
- Docker deployment support
- Linux server compatible

## Company Information

- **Founded**: 2024
- **Headquarters**: Abuja, Nigeria
- **Founder**: Nimbe Oduware
- **Website**: https://vaultacloud.com
- **Email**: hello@vaultacloud.com
